title: Glass Storage Jars with Airtight Lid - 500 ML Small Square Vintage Kitchen Canister, Decorative Wide Mouth Container for Biscuit, Cookie, Tea Bag, Coffee Ground, Sugar, Sweet, Salt, Nuts, Sunflower
features: Food-Grade Thickened Glass – Durable & Clear: Crafted from premium thickened glass, resistant to heat, moisture, and corrosion. Crystal-clear body allows you to easily identify contents for a clean and organized space.

Airtight Acacia Lid – Preserves Freshness: Natural acacia wood lid with a silicone ring keeps out air, dust, and moisture. Perfect for dry storage—ensuring your ingredients stay fresh longer. Not leak-proof—avoid liquids and upside-down use.

Wide-Mouth Design – Convenient & Easy to Clean: Space-saving square shape fits neatly in cabinets. Wide-mouth opening (3.42" outer / 2.95" inner) makes filling, scooping, and hand-washing quick and simple.

Vintage Sunflower Embossing – Elegant Home Accent: Delicate sunflower floral pattern embossed on glass, paired with rustic wood lid. Combines decorative beauty with practical storage—ideal for kitchens, pantries, bathrooms or coffee corners.

Multi-Purpose Storage – Practical Size: 500ml / 16oz – Compact and handy for everyday use. Perfect for storing loose tea, coffee grounds, spices, dried herbs, nuts, seeds, or small treats like candies and mints. Also suitable for bath salts, beads, or craft supplies—keeping small essentials fresh, neat, and accessible.
